title: Acute appendicitis in a patient immunised with COVID-19 vaccine: A case report with morphological analysis.
summary: Case report of a 58-year-old female who presented with acute appendicitis approximately 48 hours after receiving the first dose of the Pfizer-BioNTech COVID-19 vaccine.
key_findings: Acute appendicitis occurred 48 hours after first dose of Pfizer-BioNTech vaccine.
Histology showed Th-1 driven granulomatous inflammation.
data_availability_statement: Data are available upon reasonable request to the corresponding author.
